task_completion.description: Configure the pattern label and target entity type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add number pattern' or edit form showing the Label field filled with 'Urban Electronics Orders' and the 'Target entity type' dropdown set to 'Order'.
Look for the 'Plugin' dropdown on the number pattern configuration form set to 'Yearly'.
Look for the 'Prefix' input field on the number pattern configuration form containing exactly 'UE-'.
Look for the 'Padding' input field on the number pattern configuration form containing the number '6'.

Look for a green success message indicating the pattern was saved, or the 'Urban Electronics Orders' pattern appearing in the Number patterns overview list (Commerce -> Configuration -> Number patterns).

task_completion.description: Assign the pattern to the Default order type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Order types edit page for the 'Default' order type (Commerce -> Configuration -> Orders -> Order types), showing the 'Number pattern' dropdown selected as 'Urban Electronics Orders'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to configure the pattern
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Drupal admin interface in a web browser, not using terminal commands like drush to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Configuration was entered into the actual Drupal forms
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs ('Urban Electronics Orders', 'UE-', '6') must be visible inside the actual Drupal Commerce configuration forms, not just written in a text editor or search bar.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to fake the presence of the 'Urban Electronics Orders' pattern or success messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Drupal Commerce number pattern. The label must be 'Urban Electronics Orders'. The plugin type must be 'Yearly' (which resets the sequence annually). The target entity type must be 'Order' (machine name: commerce_order). The pattern prefix must be 'UE-' and the padding must be 6 digits. Finally, this pattern must be assigned to the 'Default' order type in the Order types configuration.
